comment: Perfect for a conference trip. Quiet enough for early morning calls. Three blocks from convention center as advertised.
Sarah is a fantastic host. Loft was clean and quiet. Would book again for IDWeek.
Great location. Loft is small but works for one person. Bedroom is nice and quiet for early call.
Good value. Longer walk than Mt Vernon but manageable.
Some ambient street noise on weekend nights. Fine for a solo trip.
Peaceful place quiet enough for early morning calls
Recommend for solo travelers
